Source.Name: openjdk-25
Source.Summary: Open implementation of Oracle's Java Development Kit, major version 25
Source.Description: Open implementation of Oracle's Java Development Kit, major version 25. This package includes the JDK, the JRE is not separately provided.

Package.Name: openjdk-25
Package.Summary: Open implementation of Oracle's Java Development Kit, major version 25
Package.Description: Open implementation of Oracle's Java Development Kit, major version 25. This package includes the JDK, the JRE is not separately provided.

Package.Name: openjdk-25-devel
Package.Description: Open implementation of Oracle's Java Development Kit, major version 25. This package includes the JDK, the JRE is not separately provided.
